title: BigBear.AI Stock Slips On Q1 Earnings
text: BigBear.AI stock slipped on Q1 earnings results. Despite posting revenue of $34.4 million that exceeded estimates of $33.6 million, the company missed earnings expectations with an EPS loss of $0.12 versus the estimated $0.08. The market's focus on profitability metrics over revenue beats contributed to the negative reaction, highlighting investor concerns about the company's ability to convert growing backlog into profits.
